relations.note: Charts and tables act as an exception to the asymmetric accent shape container rule.

quotes: Email px conversions (at 96dpi): large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair.
A rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): 1.25" & 0.0625" (large containers/photos), 0.5" & 0.0625" (banners), 0.4375" & 0.0625" (small callout boxes).

Email px conversions (at 96dpi): large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Maintain brand visual character with consistent asymmetric rounded container shapes across layouts.
rules.rule_text: Apply the asymmetric accent shape with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii to callout boxes, banners, and photography containers. In emails, apply the diagonal orientation consistently (default: large radius top-left and bottom-right, small 6px radius top-right and bottom-left). Key conversions at 96dpi: large containers/photos use 120px & 6px; banners use 48px & 6px; small callout boxes use 42px & 6px.

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]
Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Maintain readability and clean structure for data grids and charts by avoiding asymmetric borders.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables must use uniform rounded corners of 12px (infographic.panel.radius = 12px) on all four corners, specifically omitting the asymmetric brand accent shape.
